_doc: Baseline of GET endpoints currently flagged by scripts/check-org-isolation-coverage.ts as lacking a cross-org assertion in tests/api/organization-isolation.test.ts. As of task #399 this list is empty: every id-bearing GET endpoint is either covered by a cross-org assertion in the live test or appears on the script's EXPLICIT_ALLOWLIST with an inline justification. Task #400 wired `npm run check:org-isolation` (which runs the script with `--strict`) into CI as a blocking step, so any newly-uncovered endpoint will fail the workflow at PR time. Adding an entry here is intended only as an emergency escape hatch with security-team sign-off — the preferred fix is always to add the cross-org assertion. tests/unit/check-org-isolation-coverage.test.ts cross-checks this baseline against the live `--strict` run and fails if a new gap appears that is not also baselined.
